title: goniopteris scabra
intro: Goniopteris scabra, also known as the rough-veined fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Goniopteris scabra include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as skin conditions like acne and eczema. Goniopteris scabra can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
